response.justification: The candidate's background is heavily focused on software development and web/mobile engineering with limited relevance to principal-level hardware/SoC optimization for AI accelerators. While they have experience with Dlang, C++, and low-latency systems, there is no evidence of work with AI workloads, deep-learning hardware, or SoC/IP modeling. The educational background (BSc in Computer Science) and work experience do not meet the role's required depth in hardware-software co-design or AI accelerator optimization.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with full-stack development experience
Proficiency in multiple programming languages and systems (TypeScript, Dlang, C++)
Experience with low-latency and high-performance systems (e.g., real-time metadata handling)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in AI accelerator hardware or SoC/IP modeling
Lacks required advanced education (e.g., PhD, Master's + 6+ years, or Bachelor's + 8+ years) for principal-level role
No clear exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
